metadata.name: Add a Person to a Tour Booking

description: A customer who booked a walking tour for two people wants to add a third person.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent locates the booking for two people.

nodes.task_description: Check if there is still availability on the tour to add one more person.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms there is space for one more.

nodes.task_description: Modify the booking to include three people and collect payment for the additional person.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully updates the booking and processes the payment.
